inheritedProtocolEvidence.note: No Solidity source or protocol identifier changed in v0.8. The source-matched compiler artifacts and browser ABI passed validation. The existing isolated 13/13 v0.6 deployed-bytecode evidence is included but was not re-executed solely for this read-only application/indexer release.

implementedCapabilities: reviewed Robinhood mainnet/testnet network and protocol-contract registry
ERC-8056 corporate-action snapshots and integer-safe display helpers
24/5 oracle heartbeat, sequencer uptime/grace and oraclePaused fail-closed checks
Nitro node, ArbOS and manual-upgrade posture
read-only SDK, CLI, OpenAPI, schemas, examples and responsive UI
externalProductionGates: revalidate every reviewed contract/address/version against current official Robinhood documentation
ingest and authenticate the current official stock-token registry and Chainlink feed/heartbeat registry
deploy and test against Robinhood Chain testnet with a dedicated authenticated RPC
execute real two-chain retryable and Outbox integration tests using test assets
validate provider finalized-tag semantics and add L1 batch-posting proof telemetry
integrate a reviewed bundler/paymaster only through bounded policies
operate and monitor a real Nitro node before relying on node posture
complete independent smart-contract, frontend, infrastructure, economic and legal/compliance reviews
limitations: No live Robinhood Chain deployment or real bridge/message transaction was performed.
The official stock-token and Chainlink feed lists are dynamic and intentionally not bundled as production truth.
The integration does not sign, sponsor or broadcast UserOperations or transactions.
The local smoke uses chain 31337 and correctly reports it as absent from the reviewed Robinhood registry.
